title: Full Dis:closure
description: The story of the dissolution of a relationship.
quote: I break things, Mira. That’s what I do. It’s why I avoided you for so long… ’cause I didn’t wanna break you.
altHero: Adam and Mira in bed, looking at each other
alt1: Adam and Mira in bed postcoital
alt2: Mira looking at Adam with confused disgust
alt4: Adam looking longingly to the middle distance
